name: azure boundary: an Advisor HighAvailability category maps to the reliability pillar
command:
cat > h.json <<'JEOF'
{"platform":"azure","route":"azure-boundary","selected_option":{"option_id":"opt-balanced","summary":"Balanced","build_requirements":["encryption_at_rest","multi_az"]},"iac_targets":["bicep"],"build_units":["encryption_at_rest","multi_az"]}
JEOF
cat > native.json <<'JEOF'
{"review_ref":"native-review/azure-rg-1","recommendations":[{"recommendationId":"adv-1","category":"Security","impact":"High","shortDescription":{"solution":"Enable encryption on storage accounts"}},{"recommendationId":"adv-2","category":"HighAvailability","impact":"Medium","shortDescription":{"solution":"Use availability zones"}}]}
JEOF
bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/azure-boundary.sh" --handoff h.json --native-response native.json --out r.json --now 2026-06-08T12:00:00Z 2>/dev/null
node -e 'const j=JSON.parse(require("fs").readFileSync("r.json","utf8"));process.exit(j.normalized.recommendations.some(r=>r.id==="adv-2"&&r.pillar==="reliability")?0:1)' && echo category-mapped 1>&2
